input.prompt: Sketch a 3-column CSS grid showing deploy phases: Dev (local) | Staging (roxabituwer) | Prod (roxabituwer + systemd). Each column has a stack of pills listing services.

notes: Plain-CSS (no Mermaid, no fgraph) layout — CSS grid with pill cards. Regression anchor for the visual-explainer architecture.html pattern cited in CLAUDE.md.
